transcript: Speaker A (Human): yaar fakt pach minitan raahile. Ekda practice karun gheto. [Oh man, only five minutes left. Let me practice once.] Speaker B (AI): Let's practice your interview. Tell me about yourself. Speaker A: I am Amit and I have two year experience in sales. Speaker B: Wait. Don't use myself or I am having. Say I am Amit and I have two years of experience in sales. Speaker A: You are ready. Interview chya pahile SpeakX AI sobat fakt 5 minitan practice aani sarv bhiti gayab. Pahile 20 prashn ekdam free. Crack your interview. Download SpeakX app. [You are ready. Just 5 minutes of practice with SpeakX AI before the interview and all fear is gone. First 20 questions absolutely free. Crack your interview. Download SpeakX app.]
on_screen_text: yaar fakt pach minitan raahile. Ekda practice karun gheto. Let's practice your interview. Tell me about yourself. I am Amit and I have two year experience in sales. Don't use myself or I am having. Say I am Amit and I have two years of experience in sales. You are ready. Interview chya pahile SpeakX AI sobat fakt 5 minitan practice aani sarv bhiti gayab. Pahile 20 prashn ekdam free. Crack your interview. Download SpeakX app. SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE
summary: A job candidate uses the SpeakX AI app for a quick 5-minute interview practice session. The AI robot corrects his English introduction, boosting his confidence. The candidate then encourages viewers to download SpeakX to overcome interview fear, offering the first 20 questions for free.
